title: Delicate Russian Yogurt Soup
description: A creamy, sour, and lightly cinnamon-infused Russian yogurt soup that is airy, crowd-pleasing, and sugar-free.
instructions: Place the vegetable broth in a saucepan and add the cinnamon stick, then bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
While the broth heats, whisk the Greek yogurt with lemon juice, salt, pepper, and dried dill until smooth and airy.
After 5 minutes, remove and discard the cinnamon stick from the broth.
Reduce heat to low and stir the whisked yogurt into the hot broth in small increments, stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
Continue to warm the mixture until it reaches 45°C (113°F) and the soup is warm but not boiling, about 10 minutes.
Transfer the soup to a bowl and stir in fresh dill and a pinch of sea salt.
Serve immediately with a drizzle of olive oil and a sprinkle of paprika if desired.
Enjoy the creamy, sour, and lightly cinnamon-flavored soup.
